final_prompt_summary: Preserve the exact Nanoleaf BR30 bulb shape in a warm dusk reading corner, with one bulb grounded on a dark-green textile table, one installed in a practical lamp, and a small local mini PC on a shelf.
visual_direction: Photorealistic TaraHome editorial cover with warm residential materials, natural lighting, restrained dark-green accents, and grounded real-world hardware.
constraints: no routing, network, or decorative path lines
no translucent panels, floating UI cards, inset frames, or progress bars
no invented product controls or logos
must remain clear at article-card size
